programs.title: Cycle Around Japan
programs.desc: . A series showcasing the stunning landscapes featured in Cycle Around Japan. This time: the rural surroundings of historic Kyoto, water transportation, and a nighttime ride through bustling Osaka. Zac Reynolds.

programs.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programs.desc: , Episode 6, Season 2. It's the world's fastest land animal. But that rarely helps in Africa's bush where the cheetah thrives. Let's discover some of its amazing hunting techniques, including what looks like teleporting!. Bill Sullivan, Jeff Manning, Tetsunori Kikuchi, Masahiro Hayakawa, Koichi Okumura.

programs.title: Time-lapse Journey
programs.desc: , Episode 4, Season 2. The Amakusa region has over 120 islands and is home to one of the places where a unique form of Christianity developed. See Amakusa's historic sights and natural beauty through time-lapse photography.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Century Signboards
programs.desc: , Episode 8, Season 1. An entertainment hall home to rakugo comic stories and more for over 100 years. A place to relax and forget your cares, food and drink are welcome.

programs.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programs.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey through local cuisine, served with a side of seasonal scenery.
